items.title: SZA Warns AI Is Exploiting Black Artists, Calls Out Diplo
items.summary: Last week the Atlantic posted an upsetting report about datasets of music that are being used to train AI. I even did a quick search on my favorite artists such as Squirrel Flower and the Cramps, and both of their music included. The post SZA Warns AI Is Exploiting Black Artists, Calls Out Diplo appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: The Swifties Are Coming For Metallica’s Kirk Hammett
items.summary: You have to be really bored to provoke Taylor Swift fans. But lead guitarist Kirk Hammett, maybe in an attempt to distract from the Geese psyop allegations, recently wore a T-shirt onstage that said "Taylor Swift Is a CIA Psyop." The post The Swifties Are Coming For Metallica’s Kirk Hammett appeared first on Stereogum.
